overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain valley. The scene features heavy snow cover, scattered evergreen trees, and a winding creek, beginning near an abandoned wooden structure and progressing deeper into the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain meadow with abandoned cabin

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through deep snow away from an abandoned wooden cabin toward the forested valley

entered.detail: dilapidated log cabin with broken roof partially buried in snow
tall evergreen trees heavy with snow scattered across the meadow
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the misty background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character on horseback near an abandoned wooden cabin in a wide snowy meadow. The camera follows from behind as they ride away from the structure, heading toward a distant forested valley with snow-covered pines and mountain peaks visible through the haze.

events.description: location text 'Grizzlies West' appears in the lower left corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: following the winding path alongside a partially frozen creek through the valley

entered.detail: narrow winding waterway with dark water cutting through the snow
steep rocky outcrops and cliffs lining the left side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The character rides alongside a winding creek through the narrowing mountain valley. The abandoned cabin disappears from view behind as rocky outcrops and denser pine trees come into the foreground. The environment text identifies the location as Grizzlies West.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with rocky cliffs and dense forest

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing valley with steep rocky cliffs rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: The valley narrows significantly as the character rides deeper into the mountains. Rocky cliff faces rise prominently on the left while dense snow-covered pines line both sides of the path. The creek continues to wind alongside the trail as the terrain becomes more enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open snowy meadow into the narrowing confines of a rugged mountain valley. It begins behind a character on horseback as they ride away from an abandoned wooden cabin, heading toward distant peaks visible through a cold haze. As the rider progresses, the open meadow gives way to the Grizzlies West region, where the camera tracks alongside a winding creek and rocky outcrops that gradually replace the distant horizon. The scene then shifts as the valley tightens, with towering rocky cliff faces rising on the left and dense, snow-covered pines closing in from both sides. Finally, the terrain becomes fully enclosed, following the winding creek deeper into the heart of the mountains.
